caption: A man with a tattoo on his right upper arm is speaking into a professional microphone in a recording studio. He is wearing a grey t-shirt, black over-ear headphones, and a grey baseball cap featuring a logo of a mouth with red lips and white teeth. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels. The microphone is mounted on a black boom arm, and the text "broadcast" is visible on the equipment. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a steady position, speaking into the microphone with slight movements of his head and jaw. The lighting is consistent, and the composition of the scene remains the same across the frames, capturing him from the chest up as he focuses on his delivery.
